title: coleanthus subtilis
intro: Coleanthus subtilis, also known as the alpine sandwort, is a small, flowering plant native to the Arctic tundra and alpine regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleanthus subtilis include its potential to help manage digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support its various health benefits.
